heroSubtitle: Upload your broker statement, get tax-ready numbers for tax year 2025 (filing by May 2026). No spreadsheets, no accountant, no headaches.
stepUploadDesc: Upload your Trading212 annual statement (PDF recommended) or full transaction history (CSV).
stepCalculateDesc: Automatic tax computation using official BNR exchange rates and Romanian tax rules.
stepFileDesc: Get the exact numbers you need for your annual tax declaration.
trustAccurateDesc: We use the official National Bank of Romania rates for every transaction date. No approximations.
trustTaxLawDesc: Capital gains, dividends, and CASS health contribution. All calculated per 2025 Romanian tax legislation.
trustPrivacyDesc: Your financial data is processed and never shared. Delete your account anytime under GDPR.
trustFastDesc: Upload your PDF statement, get your tax numbers instantly. No waiting, no back-and-forth.
testimonialsPlaceholder: We're collecting feedback from our first users. Real testimonials coming soon.
founderBio: I'm Dragos Ifrim, a Romanian developer with 7+ years of experience. Last year I filed my ANAF taxes the hard way: digging through Trading212 statements, hunting BNR exchange rates line by line, cross-checking CASS brackets. It was painful and error-prone. I built InvesTax so I'd never have to do that again, and to spare every other Romanian investor from the same grind.
